title: Minimum Number of Operations to Reinitialize a Permutation
titleCn: 还原排列的最少操作步数

testcases.input: n = 2 Output: 1 Explanation: perm = [0,1] initially. After the 1st operation, perm = [0,1] So it takes only 1 operation.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: perm = [0,1] initially. After the 1st operation, perm = [0,1] So it takes only 1 operation.

testcases.input: n = 4 Output: 2 Explanation: perm = [0,1,2,3] initially. After the 1st operation, perm = [0,2,1,3] After the 2nd operation, perm = [0,1,2,3] So it takes only 2 operations.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: perm = [0,1,2,3] initially. After the 1st operation, perm = [0,2,1,3] After the 2nd operation, perm = [0,1,2,3] So it takes only 2 operations.
